name: Charm Monster
description: Makes monster believe it is your ally.

name: Clairaudience/Clairvoyance
description: Hear or see at a distance for 1 min./level.

name: Contagion
description: Infects subject with a chosen disease (Fortitude negates).

name: Cure Serious Wounds
description: When laying your hand upon a living creature, you channel positive energy that cures 3d8 points of damage +1 per caster level (maximum +15).

name: Daylight
description: The object touched sheds light as bright as full daylight in a 60-foot radius, and dim light for an additional 60 feet beyond that. Creatures that take penalties in bright light also take them while within the radius of this magical light.

name: Dispel Magic
description: You can use dispel magic to end ongoing spells that have been cast on a creature or object, to temporarily suppress the magical abilities of a magic item, or to counter another spellcaster's spell.

name: Fireball
description: A fireball spell generates a searing explosion of flame that detonates with a low roar and deals 1d6 points of fire damage per caster level (maximum 10d6) to every creature within the area.

name: Fly
description: The subject can fly at a speed of 60 feet (or 40 feet if it wears medium or heavy armor). The subject can fly up, down, and laterally. The subject gains a maneuverability of good.

name: Gaseous Form
description: Subject and gear become insubstantial, misty, and translucent.

name: Good Hope
description: Subjects gain +2 morale bonus on saving throws, attack rolls, ability checks, skill checks, and weapon damage rolls.

name: Haste
description: The transmuted creatures move and act more quickly than normal. This extra speed has several effects: each hasted creature may make one extra attack in any round when it takes a full attack action.

name: Heal Animal Companion
description: Heals 10 hit points per caster level (maximum 150) to an animal companion.

name: Hold Person
description: The subject becomes paralyzed and freezes in place. It is aware and breathes normally but cannot take any actions, even speech.

name: Inflict Serious Wounds
description: When laying your hand upon a creature, you channel negative energy that deals 3d8 points of damage +1 per caster level (maximum +15).

name: Lightning Bolt
description: You release a powerful stroke of electrical energy that deals 1d6 points of electricity damage per caster level (maximum 10d6) to each creature within its area.

name: Phantom Steed
description: Magic horse appears for 1 hour/level.

name: Poison
description: Touch attack deals 1d10 Constitution damage (Fortitude half), with the same secondary damage 1 round later.

name: Prayer
description: You bring special favor upon yourself and your allies while bringing discord to your enemies. Each round, all allies within the area receive a +1 luck bonus on attack rolls, weapon damage rolls, saves, and skill checks, while each enemy suffers a -1 penalty.

name: Quench
description: Extinguishes all nonmagical fires in a 20-ft. radius; deals 1d6/level (max 10d6) to fire creatures.

name: Remove Blindness/Deafness
description: Remove blindness/deafness cures blindness or deafness (your choice), whether the effect is normal or magical in nature.

name: Remove Disease
description: Cures all diseases affecting subject, including magical diseases.

name: Scrying
description: Spies on subject from a distance.

name: Sculpt Sound
description: Creates new sounds or changes existing ones.

name: Searing Light
description: Focusing divine power like a ray of the sun, you project a blast of light from your open palm. You must succeed on a ranged touch attack to strike your target. A creature struck by this ray of light takes 1d8 points of damage per two caster levels (maximum 5d8).

name: Slow
description: An affected creature moves and attacks at a drastically slowed rate. A slowed creature can take only a single move action or standard action each turn, but not both (nor may it take full-round actions).

name: Speak with Dead
description: You grant the semblance of life and intelligence to a corpse, allowing it to answer several questions that you put to it. You may ask one question per two caster levels (maximum six questions).

name: Spike Growth
description: Spikes on the ground deal 1d4 damage per 5 ft. moved through and slow movement.

name: Vampiric Touch
description: You must succeed on a melee touch attack. Your touch deals 1d6 points of damage per two caster levels (maximum 10d6). You gain temporary hit points equal to the damage you deal. You cannot gain more than the subject's current hit points +10, which is enough to kill the subject.

name: Water Breathing
description: Touched subjects can breathe underwater.
